channel.title: Effective Altruism Denmark
channel.description: Recent content on Effective Altruism Denmark

item.title: EA Copenhagen
item.description:
--
Active Members

Events per Month
--
Year Founded

About EA Copenhagen

This page is coming soon. We’re building out information about the Copenhagen chapter.

Possible sections for this page:

  • Welcome message and chapter overview
  • Upcoming events calendar
  • Regular meetup schedule (e.g., weekly discussion groups, monthly socials)
  • Chapter organizers with photos and bios
  • Meeting location / venue information
  • How to get involved
  • Featured projects and initiatives
  • Photo gallery from past events
  • Testimonials from members
  • Links to local social media and communication channels

Get Involved

Interested in joining EA Copenhagen? Reach out to us at contact@effectivealtruism.dk or find us on our social media channels.

  • Current projects and reading groups
  • How to get involved as a student or professional

  • Links to local social media

Get Involved

Interested in joining EA Aarhus? Reach out to us at contact@effectivealtruism.dk or find us on our social media channels.

About EA Odense

This page is coming soon. We’re building out the Odense chapter.

Possible sections for this page:

  • Welcome message and vision for EA Odense
  • Founding team and organizers
  • Connection to University of Southern Denmark (SDU)
  • Planned events and activities
  • Interest form for potential members
  • How students can start an EA group on campus
  • Resources for newcomers to EA
  • Links to national EA Denmark events

Help Us Build This Chapter

EA Odense is looking for passionate organizers! If you’re based in Odense and want to help grow the local EA community, get in touch at contact@effectivealtruism.dk.

Help Us Build This Chapter

EA Aalborg is looking for passionate organizers! If you’re based in Aalborg and want to help grow the local EA community, get in touch at contact@effectivealtruism.dk.

item.title: EA is three radical ideas I want to protect
item.description:
Effective altruism contains three radical ideas that I don’t easily find in other communities. These three ideas are ideas I want to protect.

Radical Empathy. Humanity has long had a fairly narrow moral circle. Radical Empathy is the idea that there are many groups of people, or other entities, that are worthy of our moral consideration even if we don’t naturally feel empathy towards them. This includes people in distant countries, future generations, and non-human animals.

item.title: Snakebites kill 100,000 people every year, here's what you should know
item.description:
Snakebites kill 100,000 people every year. When I first heard this I refused to believe it. How had I managed to call myself an EA for so many years and not known snakebites were this significant a cause of death?

Snakebite envenoming is one of the most neglected tropical diseases. It primarily affects the world’s poorest and most vulnerable populations - agricultural workers in rural areas of developing countries. The World Health Organization has classified it as a “neglected tropical disease of the highest priority.”

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Who We Are

Effective Altruism Denmark is an Almen Forening steered by passionate volunteers and guided by its members. Everyone aims to make a positive impact, but lots of ways of doing good are ineffective. Our core goal is to answer the question: How can we use our time and money to help others the most?

Our Practical Mission

  • Fundraising for top charities: We are committed to raising funds for the world’s most pressing challenges. Our sister organisation, GivEffektivt, raises millions of DKK for the most evidence-backed, high-impact global health interventions.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Effective Altruism Denmark Vesterbrogade 149, Bygning 5 1620 København

Email: contact@effectivealtruism.dk CVR: 41417226

Find Us Online

  • Facebook
  • LinkedIn
  • Instagram
  • YouTube

item.title: EA Denmark Membership
item.description:
Membership Benefits

Annual membership dues are 50 DKK. As a member you can:

  • Choose your membership pathway and engagement level
  • Attend annual events including our summer retreat
  • Subscribe to our calendar and access event photos
  • Join our Discord forum for ongoing discussions
  • Participate in projects and working groups
  • Get assistance with self-development and career planning
  • Volunteer for impactful projects
  • Provide strategic input and vote at our General Assembly

If you are experiencing financial hardship, exceptions can be made. Please reach out to us.

item.title: Events
item.description:
Check our social media channels for the latest events, or subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated.

We regularly host:

  • Discussion groups on EA topics
  • Career workshops and guidance sessions
  • Social meetups for the EA community
  • Reading groups covering key EA texts
  • Guest lectures from researchers and practitioners

Follow us on Facebook for event updates, or become a member to get access to our community calendar.

item.title: Get Career Guidance
item.description:
Help You Make Good Plans

We help you think through your career options systematically, considering your skills, interests, and where you could have the most impact.

Expand Your Network

Connect with like-minded professionals and access resources that can help you transition into high-impact roles.

item.title: Introduction to Effective Altruism
item.description:
An Outstanding Opportunity to Do Good

Many of us aspire to make a meaningful impact in the world. Witnessing suffering, injustice, and death prompts us to want to take action. Yet, finding a tangible solution to these issues, and more importantly, implementing it, is not straightforward.

Effective altruism offers a solution to this challenge. It is a research field dedicated to maximizing the impact of our efforts to aid others. By employing rigorous evidence and thoughtful reasoning, effective altruism seeks to address the question of how we can help others most effectively.
